common.addressFull: Leliu Street, Shunde District, Foshan City, Guangdong Province, China

hero.slide1Desc: Specializing in premium furniture hardware solutions — blending German precision with Italian design for an unparalleled smooth motion experience.
hero.slide2Desc: Hinges, drawer systems, lift systems — every product undergoes rigorous quality testing for 200,000+ smooth cycles.
hero.slide3Desc: 20 years of industry expertise, serving over 2,000 furniture manufacturers worldwide, setting industry standards through innovation.

brand.title: Precision Hardware · Inspired Motion
brand.subtitle: — moving ideas. moving quality. —
brand.desc: PINSHIGAO Hardware is dedicated to providing high-quality hardware solutions for furniture manufacturers worldwide. We blend German precision engineering with Italian design aesthetics, transforming every open and close into a pleasure.

hinges.name: Hinge Systems
hinges.desc: From standard hinges to tool-free quick-fit systems covering all furniture applications with 100,000-cycle quality assurance.

drawers.name: Drawer Systems
drawers.desc: Silent damping drawer systems, 30-80kg load capacity, butter-smooth motion for premium kitchen and wardrobe storage.

lifts.name: Lift Systems
lifts.desc: Electric and manual lift systems with servo-drive technology, stop at any position — redefining wall cabinet experience.

slides.name: Sliding Systems
slides.desc: Ball-bearing slides and concealed under-mount rails, 15-80kg load, 3-section full extension for every furniture need.

handles.name: Handle Collection
handles.desc: From minimalist to luxurious, aluminum, stainless steel, brass multi-material options — the finishing touch for every piece.

hinge.name: PSG-Pro Series Damped Hinge
hinge.desc: Built-in integrated damper, 45mm short-arm design, compatible with various cabinet thicknesses. 3D adjustment ±3mm, easy installation. Tested for 200,000 cycles of proven durability.

drawer.name: PSG-Sleek Silent Drawer System
drawer.desc: Fully concealed rail design, integrated damping and auto-close function. Ultra-slim 12mm side profile maximizes interior storage. 50kg load capacity, smooth and silent operation.

cases.title: Application Cases
cases.subtitle: From premium custom kitchens to modern office spaces, PINSHIGAO Hardware creates beautiful spaces with global clients

kitchen.title: Premium Custom Kitchen · Hangzhou
kitchen.desc: Featuring full PSG-Pro damped hinges and PSG-Sleek drawer systems

wardrobe.title: Walk-in Closet · Shenzhen Bay
wardrobe.desc: Concealed slides and integrated handle systems

catalog.title: Product Catalog
catalog.desc: Download full product catalogs with detailed specifications and technical data.

resources.title: Resources
resources.desc: Access installation guides, 3D models, CAD drawings, and technical documents.

tech.title: Technical Support
tech.desc: Professional engineering team for product selection, installation guidance, and after-sales support.

shop.title: Online Shop
shop.desc: Easy online ordering, real-time inventory, fast logistics.

item1.title: PINSHIGAO at China International Furniture Fair 2024
item1.desc: The new PSG-Pro series debuted publicly, receiving high praise from industry experts.

item2.title: New Servo-Drive Lift System Launched
item2.desc: Touch-open, intelligent stop — the perfect hardware solution for smart homes.

item3.title: Phase II of Foshan Smart Factory Begins Production
item3.desc: Annual capacity increased to 50 million units with new fully automated assembly lines.

cta.title: Partner with PINSHIGAO — Create Quality Spaces Together
cta.desc: Contact us for professional product selection advice and sample support

footer.about: Founded in 2004, PINSHIGAO Hardware specializes in furniture hardware R&D, manufacturing, and sales. Products exported to 50+ countries, serving 2,000+ furniture manufacturers.

about.title: About PINSHIGAO
about.subtitle: Precision Hardware · Inspired Motion
about.intro: Founded in 2004 and headquartered in Foshan, Guangdong — China's Hardware Capital — PINSHIGAO Hardware Co., Ltd. specializes in the R&D, manufacturing, and sales of furniture hardware, including hinges, drawer systems, lift systems, sliding systems, handles, and more.
about.mission: Committed to providing high-quality, high-precision, high-reliability hardware solutions for furniture manufacturers worldwide, driving industry development through technological innovation.

milestones.event: Phase I of Foshan Smart Factory launched

hero.title: Application Solutions
hero.subtitle: Comprehensive hardware solutions for every space — from kitchen to wardrobe to office

kitchen.title: Kitchen Solutions
kitchen.desc: Complete kitchen hardware systems featuring premium hinges, drawer slides, and lift mechanisms. Our kitchen solutions deliver silent damping, smooth motion, and long-lasting durability for modern culinary spaces.

wardrobe.title: Wardrobe Solutions
wardrobe.desc: Integrated wardrobe hardware systems combining smooth sliding doors, concealed drawer rails, and ergonomic handle designs. Create organized, elegant storage spaces with precision hardware.

office.title: Office Solutions
office.desc: Professional office furniture hardware including heavy-duty slides, lock systems, and cable management solutions. Designed for daily commercial use with reliability at the core.

cta.title: Need a Custom Solution?
cta.desc: Our engineering team works closely with furniture manufacturers to develop tailored hardware solutions for your specific application requirements.
